entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00130) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION INCREASES SUBCLIN 10003GC FOR POST AWARD CHANGES TO FOREIGN MILITARY SALES (FMS) HULLS FOR JORDAN.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00131) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION INCREASES SUBCLIN 10003GC FOR POST AWARD CHANGES TO FOREIGN MILITARY SALES (FMS) HULLS FOR JORDAN. ALSO, ADDS THE SCOPE OF WORK AND JORDAN PAINT RECOAT EQUIPMENT REMOVAL LIST FOR JC 26 EXTERIOR PAINT COLOR CHANGE.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00132) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION INCREASES SUBCLIN 10003HC FOR POST AWARD CHANGES TO FOREIGN MILITARY SALES (FMS) HULLS FOR BAHRAIN. ALSO, MODIFIES APPLICABLE SPECIFICATION REQUIREMENTS AND EXTENDS THE PRO MARINETTE FACILITY TERMS.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00135) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A0024A) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: NOTE; THE TOTAL AMOUNT: $2,698,643,931.00 STATED WITHIN CIMS IS INFLATED DUE TO THE VARIOUS ORDERING SCENARIOS OF BOAT HULLS DURING ALL ORDERING PERIODS.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
